summary: M3 Gate is closed after PR #80 entered origin/main at 2bf90fdd9f009c30ff104926944e8434c4e0b579 with M3_GATE = PASS. Lead advanced current_milestone to M4, closed the M3 Gate systems_architect and qa_reviewer child threads, and created M4-TASK-GRAPH-001 as the first READY M4 task. No M4 implementation has started yet; next action is to start M4-TASK-GRAPH-001 with systems_architect writer and independent qa_reviewer.

tests_run.result: Quality/Web/Browser Smoke and Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact passed
M4 task READY and goal-mode current_milestone M4

decisions: M3_GATE = PASS is now main-integrated and M3 implementation work is complete.
M4 begins with a task-graph planning task, not direct implementation.
Manual node battle, complex naval warfare, full diplomacy, 3D battle, multiplayer/server, telemetry, arbitrary-code mods, and frozen product/architecture changes remain excluded or Human-Gated.
risks: M4 task graph still needs systems_architect/qa review before implementation tasks exist.
H-003/H-005 remain initial M3 fixture-level evidence, not M5 player-study or global balance proof.
requested_action: Commit and merge this closure branch, sync main, then start M4-TASK-GRAPH-001 with systems_architect writer and independent qa_reviewer.
